Home Our Process

Our Process

p r o c e s s

Free Consultation

We start with a free custom design consultation to understand your needs, space, and vision.

Custom Design

Our team creates a custom design tailored to your specific space and requirements.

Manufacturing

We manufacture your lockers in Canada using premium 3/4" birch wood and highest quality materials.

Modular Design

Damaged parts can be replaced individually—no need to replace the entire locker.

Full Customization

Team colors, logos, player names—unlimited design options for your brand.

Premium Materials

Full 3/4" birch wood construction built to last a lifetime.

Free Design Service

Every project starts with a free custom design consultation.

about club

Welcome to PlayerStall, a premium sports locker solution. We design custom wood lockers for collegiate and professional teams.
